zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel Marmion於大約1160年出生在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素時，她的父親Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby62歲，母親Melisende de Rethel43歲。她於大約1178年與Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1210年9月29日之前在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Marmion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel Marmion was born about 1160, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, her father, Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby, was 62 and her mother, Melisende de Rethel, was 43. She married Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford about 1178, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 29 September 1210, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel Marmion est née environ 1160, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Melisende de Rethel, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford environ 1178, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 29 septembre 1210, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel Marmion um 1160 in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby 62 und ihre Mutter Melisende de Rethel 43. Sie hat um 1178 in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 29. September 1210 in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel Marmionが約1160年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsbyは62歳，母Melisende de Rethelは43歳であった。約1178年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルでHugh de Saye Baron of Burfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1210年9月29日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel Marmion(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby(은)는 62세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Melisende de Rethel(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 대략 1178년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1210년 9월 29일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel Marmion родилась около 1160 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Melisende de Rethel, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Saye Baron of Burford около 1178 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 29 сентябрь 1210 г. в её родном городе.
